message:
fix(pages): harden storage access, error recovery, and cache/OPFS cleanup

Guard sessionStorage/localStorage access against SecurityError, add
recoverFromAppInitFailure for graceful auth screen fallback, clean up
OPFS files on init failure, fix clearStoredSession to use abstracted
storage getters, validate share link IDs, await controller change
before reload on SW update, and clear all version-prefixed caches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
